title: CyberHUD
description: Replaces Minecraft's vanilla HUD icons with clean sci-fi/cyberpunk status bars.
body:
# CyberHUD

**CyberHUD** transforms Minecraft's vanilla HUD into a sleek sci-fi / cyberpunk interface without changing the layout players already know.

Instead of hearts, armor icons, hunger shanks, and air bubbles, **CyberHUD** displays clean status bars with centered values, keeping the screen readable, modern, and immersive during normal gameplay.

### P.S.
It does not try to redesign the entire game interface or bury the screen under heavy effects.
It simply gives Minecraft a cleaner, more high-tech HUD that feels natural from the first minute of play.
